solutions.solution: (c) When condition is not applied, the coding is done as follows. P E J D W U | | | | | | 5 8 2 7 9 © But here the first letter is a consonant and the last letter is a vowel, therefore condition (iii) is applied here. As condition (iii) is applied here, both the first and the last letters are to be coded as the code for the vowel. P E J D W U | | | | | | © 8 2 7 9 © ∴ Code for PEJDWU ⇒ ©8279©

(d) When condition is not applied, the coding is done as follows. D M E A K J | | | | | | 7 % 8 $ ★ 2 But here both the first and the last letters are consonants, therefore condition (ii) is applied here. As condition (ii) is applied here, both the first and the last letters are to be coded as 6. D M E A K J | | | | | | 6 % 8 $ ★ 6 ∴ Code for DMEAKJ ⇒ 6%8$★6
(c) Here, none of the condition is applied, so the coding is done as follows. I B H W P O | | | | | | 1 3 6 1 9 5 4 ∴ Code for IBHWPO ⇒ 361954
(e) Here, none of the condition is applied, so the coding is done as follows. U K P D M I | | | | | | @ ★ 5 7 % 3 ∴ Code for UKPDMI ⇒ @★57%3
(d) From Statement II. N F R S C A | | | | | | 0 5 3 % 2 0
